name: kekule
when_to_use: 化学场景超出单个 2D 结构式时用它:reaction scheme(reactant→product,箭头上带 agent/条件)、谱图(NMR/IR/MS/UV)、3D 分子渲染或可编辑结构 widget;从 MOL/SMILES/CML 载入分子。单个 2D 结构式用 smiles-drawer/openchemlib/jsme,需要反应式、谱图、3D 或编辑才上 kekule。
why_valuable: cheminformatics 工具箱:reaction 布局(reactant→product、箭头上方 agent)、谱图峰/轴绘制、3D 渲染、结构编辑,外加 MOL/SMILES/CML 格式 IO;原生 AI 画反应式与谱图都不可靠,更无法解析化学格式。

data_in.note: kekule 的 +esm 自动打包失败(bundle 依赖 Node 内建 'vm'),必须走 UMD dist/kekule.min.js(挂全局 Kekule)。Kekule.IO.loadFormatData(data, format) 解析,Viewer 渲染。

schema.data: string —— 化学数据:SMILES(如 'O=C=O')、MOLfile 文本 或 CML
schema.format: string —— 'smi' | 'mol' | 'cml' | 'kcj' ...(与 data 对应的格式标识)
schema.viewerOptions?: object —— Kekule.ChemWidget.Viewer 选项(如 enableToolbar 等),默认最简查看器

spec.note: Kekule.ChemWidget.Viewer 读取元素尺寸;给容器显式 px 宽高(如 400x300),禁 vh/百分比高。

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:UMD script 挂全局 Kekule + theme CSS,document 上下文可用
carriers.widget: conditional:UMD 全局 + widget 框架向 body 追加 UI,shadow 隔离不干净,建议活体探针
carriers.codex: supported:script-global 在 JS 运行时可加载

isolation.evidence: Load path verified: jsDelivr +esm returns 200 but body is a stub — 'Failed to bundle using Rollup ... imports an unsupported Node.js built-in module "vm"'; UMD dist/kekule.min.js 200 sets global Kekule; theme dist/themes/default/kekule.css 200. API verified in min.js: Kekule.ChemWidget.Viewer (95 hits), setChemObj (34), Kekule.IO.loadFormatData (12) / saveFormatData (4); README shows new Kekule.Molecule() + Kekule.IO.saveFormatData(mol,'smi'). License: registry top-level `license` is null but the version carries `licenses:[{type:'MIT'}]`, a /LICENSE file (200), and README states 'released under MIT license' → MIT. globalStyleInjection=yes (theme CSS + framework). globalDomMutation/globalEvents=yes: Kekule.Widget is a full widget framework with a global widget manager that appends tooltips/context-menus/measurement nodes to document.body and binds document-level pointer/resize. shadowCompatible=conditional (leaning no). confidence low: large minified UMD not fully audited; project VERIFY rule → run one live probe before shelving.

en.when_to_use: Use it when the chemistry scenario goes beyond one 2D structural formula: a reaction scheme with reactant -> product and agents/conditions above the arrow, spectra (NMR/IR/MS/UV), 3D molecule rendering, or an editable structure widget. Load molecules from MOL/SMILES/CML. For one 2D structure use smiles-drawer/openchemlib/jsme; use kekule only when you need reactions, spectra, 3D, or editing.
en.why_valuable: A cheminformatics toolkit with reaction layout, including reactant -> product and agents above the arrow, spectrum peak/axis drawing, 3D rendering, structure editing, and MOL/SMILES/CML format IO. Native AI cannot draw reactions or spectra reliably, much less parse chemical formats.

data_in.note: The kekule +esm auto-bundle fails because the bundle depends on Node's built-in 'vm'; use UMD dist/kekule.min.js, which exposes global Kekule. Parse with Kekule.IO.loadFormatData(data, format) and render with Viewer.

schema.data: string -- Chemical data: SMILES such as 'O=C=O', MOLfile text, or CML
schema.viewerOptions?: object -- Kekule.ChemWidget.Viewer options such as enableToolbar; defaults to a minimal viewer

spec.note: Kekule.ChemWidget.Viewer reads element dimensions; give the container explicit pixel width and height, such as 400x300. vh and percentage heights are forbidden.
